detail: init objective="Align bridged Responses SSE with native Codex response pattern so routed chat models get native-style tool-cell grouping. Hypothesis: raw reasoning exposed as Thinking text splits exec cells; native reasoning items do not. WP1 diagnosis (bridge paths + codex-rs grouping/rendering evidence via gpt-5.5 explorers + live glm-5.2 SSE capture) -> diagnosis doc. WP2 implement diagnosed alignment (native-shaped reasoning emission / display mode reusing hideThinkingSummary; reasoning never between same-turn function_calls). WP3 verify (SSE-shape tests, live re-probe, full suite + tsc, fresh gpt-5.5 review, SoT sync). Scope src/bridge.ts, src/responses/*, openai-chat event mapping, types, tests, devlog. OUT gui/docs-site/cursor/native passthrough. DONE = evidence-backed diagnosis + wire-shape parity + gates green + reviewer pass; app-visual confirmation is user residual. Budget 3 work-phases ~90min, subagents gpt-5.5 only." criteria=0
